ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var errorTypeMapping = { "APP:VALIDATION_ERROR": {status: 400, category: "VALIDATION"}, "APP:DUPLICATE_MESSAGE": {status: 409, category: "DUPLICATE"}, "HTTP:CONNECTIVITY": {status: 503, category: "CONNECTIVITY"}, "HTTP:TIMEOUT": {status: 504, category: "TIMEOUT"}, "HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED": {status: 401, category: "AUTHENTICATION"}, "HTTP:FORBIDDEN": {status: 403, category: "AUTHORIZATION"}, "HTTP:NOT_FOUND": {status: 404, category: "NOT_FOUND"}, "HTTP:BAD_REQUEST": {status: 400, category: "BAD_REQUEST"}, "HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR": {status: 502, category: "DOWNSTREAM"}, "MULE:EXPRESSION": {status: 500, category: "TRANSFORMATION"}, "MULE:TRANSFORMATION": {status: 500, category: "TRANSFORMATION"} } var errorInfo = errorTypeMapping[error.errorType.identifier] default {status: 500, category: "UNKNOWN"} --- { success: false, message: error.description default "An unexpected error occurred", errorCategory: errorInfo.category, errorType: error.errorType.identifier, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, retryable: ["CONNECTIVITY", "TIMEOUT", "DOWNSTREAM"] contains errorInfo.category, httpStatus: errorInfo.status }

%dw 2.0 output application/json fun maskSensitiveFields(obj) = obj match { case is Object -> obj mapObject ((value, key) -> if (["password", "secret", "token", "authorization", "client_secret", "apiKey"] contains (key as String)) (key): "****MASKED****" else (key): maskSensitiveFields(value) ) case is Array -> obj map maskSensitiveFields($) else -> obj } --- { correlationId: correlationId, flowName: flow.name, errorType: error.errorType.identifier, errorDescription: error.description, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, payloadSnapshot: maskSensitiveFields(vars.originalPayload default {}) }

logger.doc:name: Log Retryable Status
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, errorType: error.errorType.identifier, isRetryable: vars.isRetryable, timestamp: now()}]
